cru_units.action:  Search results can be viewed in a list.
cru_units.title: Mobile application - Search result in a list view
cru_units.description:  Search results can be viewed in a list. Each element in the list represents a specific restaurant. cru_units.action: On the mobile application, a user should have a profile page.
cru_units.title: Mobile application - Profile page
cru_units.description: On the mobile application, a user should have a profile page. On the profile page a user can edit his/her information, which includes the password, e-mail address and phone number. A user should also be able to choose what language the mobile application should be set to. The different language choices are Swedish, English, Spanish and French.
